Interface MenuType

All Superinterfaces:
Keyed, RegistryAware
All Known Subinterfaces:
MenuType.Typed<V,B>
@Experimental public interface MenuType extends Keyed, RegistryAware
Represents different kinds of views, also known as menus, which can be created and viewed by the player.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    MenuType.Typed<V extends InventoryView, B extends InventoryViewBuilder<V>>
    Typed represents a subtype of MenuTypes that have a known InventoryView type at compile time.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description

    static final MenuType.Typed<InventoryView, LocationInventoryViewBuilder<InventoryView>>
    GENERIC_3X3
    A MenuType which represents a dispenser/dropper like menu with 3 columns and 3 rows.

    GENERIC_9X1
    A MenuType which represents a chest with 1 row.

    A MenuType which represents a chest with 2 rows.

    Class<? extends InventoryView>
    getInventoryViewClass()
    Gets the InventoryView class of this MenuType.

    getKey()
    Deprecated.
    A key might not always be present, use RegistryAware.getKeyOrThrow() instead.

    typed()
    Yields this MenuType as a typed version of itself with a plain InventoryView representing it.

    Yields this MenuType as a typed version of itself with a specific InventoryView representing it.

  • Method Details

    • typed

      @NotNull MenuType.Typed<InventoryView, InventoryViewBuilder<InventoryView>> typed()
      Yields this MenuType as a typed version of itself with a plain InventoryView representing it.
      Returns:
      the typed MenuType.

    • typed

      @NotNull <V extends InventoryView, B extends InventoryViewBuilder<V>> MenuType.Typed<V,B> typed(@NotNull Class<V> viewClass) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Yields this MenuType as a typed version of itself with a specific InventoryView representing it.
      Type Parameters:
      V - the generic type of the InventoryView to get this MenuType with
      B - the generic type of the InventoryViewBuilder to get this MenuType with
      Parameters:
      viewClass - the class type of the InventoryView to type this InventoryView with.
      Returns:
      the typed MenuType
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the provided viewClass cannot be typed to this MenuType

    • getInventoryViewClass

      @NotNull Class<? extends InventoryView> getInventoryViewClass()
      Gets the InventoryView class of this MenuType.
      Returns:
      the InventoryView class of this MenuType

    • getKey

      @NotNull @Deprecated(since="1.21.4") NamespacedKey getKey()
      Deprecated.
      A key might not always be present, use RegistryAware.getKeyOrThrow() instead.
      Return the namespaced identifier for this object.
      Specified by:
      getKey in interface Keyed
      Returns:
      this object's key
      See Also:
      • RegistryAware.getKeyOrThrow()
      • RegistryAware.isRegistered()
